title: Planet Labs Revenue Jumps 20% in Q2 2024
text: Planet Labs reported Q2 fiscal 2024 earnings with revenue in line with expectations, while gross margin and adjusted EBITDA outperformed for the quarter. CEO Will Marshall noted that the company reported an 11% year-over-year revenue growth rate for Q2 FY2024. For the full fiscal year 2024, Planet Labs increased revenue by 15% year-over-year to $220.7 million. During fiscal 2024, the company's revenue in the Defense & Intelligence vertical grew over 30% year-over-year, while revenue in the Civil Government vertical also saw solid growth. The company was experiencing strong revenue growth driven primarily by government and defense contracts.
